allow: Bash(node -e "import\('node:http'\).then\(\({createServer}\) => { import\('node:fs/promises'\).then\(async \({readFile,stat}\) => { const path = await import\('node:path'\); const root='dist'; createServer\(async \(req,res\)=>{ try{ let p=path.join\(root,req.url==='/'?'/index.html':req.url\); const data=await readFile\(p\); res.writeHead\(200\); res.end\(data\);}catch\(e\){res.writeHead\(404\);res.end\(\);} }\).listen\(4173,\(\)=>console.log\('listening on 4173'\)\); }\); }\);")
